text.title: BEST Things to Do in Paris in 3 Days 🇫🇷 Viral Restaurants, Vintage Shops, Iconic Museums & More ♡

[music]
Top three. My favorite memories in
Paris.
Unboxing
[music]

>> [applause]
[music]
>> and so excited to be bringing you guys
along.
Good morning from another beautiful day
in Paris. We are going to Leare. Woo!
So, it'll be a lot of vintage shopping.
I have quite a few places saved on my
phone. We're going to go to Karet to get
some brunch and some hot chocolate and
then start our morning in that area. So,
let's get going.
Wow. Holy moly. This is the line, guys.

Guys, this place [music] is a gold mine.

Such a gorgeous piece, but it's a little

than me. She's not a regular mom. She's

shop. And of course, Korean's favorite

is a must. €35. I think I'm going to go
with the purple one.
Wow. Even with the reservation, it seems

a Michelin star restaurant. I really
want to try here.
You'll find a bell pepper tart with

very
well.
>> [music]
It's so soft, [music] so decadent and

>> Oh, you know what this tastes like? It
tastes like fah roch without the nut.
Right. Just came back from dinner. The
French was good. I would give it about
like seven out of 10. For the price of
€148 per person, I thought it was pretty
worth it. But anyways, before I wash up
and go to sleep, let's do a little
unboxing.
First things first, these are for my me
and my hubby. We love sour candy from
Europe, so I got a bunch when I went to
the convenience store. And I got this
cute little bag from Mercy. This was
€35. I think I'm going to use this a lot
actually. Next is a perfume I got from
Dip Teique. Forgot what they say. It's
called Vo.
This is such like a sexy like fall
[music] winter vibe scent. And this is
actually $150 cheaper to buy in Paris
versus buying in New York. So this was
always on my wish list. So glad passed
by the boutique. And then last but not
least,
my favorite purchase of the day. It's
from the Frankie shop. We went to like
what, seven different vintage shops and
tried a bunch of things. Nothing really
kind of stuck with us. But when we went
to the Frankie shop, this leather
jacket, my god, let [music] me show you.
This is how it looks like. [music] It's
really, really chic. And the belt like
loops around so I can wear it like this
and then just tie it like that.
Absolutely love it. This was also around
like $150 cheaper to buy it in Paris
compared [music] to New York. So really
really happy with this purchase. We are
actually exhausted. So I'll see you guys
tomorrow.
>> [music]
>> ice.
Today we are headed to the Lou. We have
a 10:00 entry [music] appointment, so
we're trying to make it there on time.
But every corner in Paris is so scenic
that we end up keep taking photos. Now
it's like 10:30 and we're only going to
have like an hour and a half before our
lunch appointment.

This is our moment, guys. [music]

Wow.
details
[music]
things I do for my mother. Wait [music]
in the lines to see the little stuff.
[music]
Today's lunch spot is Nul.
[music]
[music]
Just finished our lunch at Lulu. I
wanted to sit by like on the outside
over there, but turns out it's seasonal.
So after the summer, [music] they
actually closed it down. The seats were
good. I don't know if it's worth coming
here if [music] those balcony seats are
not available. The food is okay, but
it's kind of expensive. We got a really
simple pasta and a ve [music] dish and a
bottle of water, and it came out to be
€72. So, really not that cheap. But the
really, really exciting news is that I
was [music] able to score two gazelle
tickets for tonight. Super last minute.
It's like [music] the balcony sea, so
the view is going to be amazing.
Spectacular. So, so so so exciting.
[music] So, we're going to go shop real
quick cuz we did not bring anything for
the ballet. We're going to go pick up
the jacket that I ordered from APC and
go to either like Zara or like Mango and
just, you know, pick up like a simple
dress that's not so expensive.
And we're back here. This is what I came
for. I had them order [music] a smaller
size for me cuz I love love love this.
These are gifts from [music] mother.
>> Yay. Thank you, mommy. We are on our way
to the ballet. But before we go, I
wanted to show you guys what I got from
Mango. I got this dress with this
hardware, this gold hardware, and then
I'm pairing it with my Reformation
stockings, my Zara shoes, and the
Frankie Shop leather jacket I got
yesterday. Guys, I am so excited to go
and so excited to be bringing you guys
along. Let's go.
Wow, this is spectacular.
[music]
Wow.
The perfect view. Not too fish.
Guys, look at the ceiling. I've never
seen anything like this. Wow.
Incredible. [music and applause]
>> [applause and music]
>> Guys, Jazelle was incredible. The venue,
the [music] set design, the costume, the
performance. My god, I was just so blown
away. I think this is top three [music]
my favorite memories in Paris, like
ever, like ever. And I've been here
almost like 10 times. So highly highly
recommend if you ever get a chance to go
to Pelle Garnier for an opera or a
ballet. I think it's a,000% worth the
money.
We just sat down at a random cafe. We're
going to grab quick breakfast before we
head to Versail.
Okay, so I order cafe mocha. I don't
know why they gave it to me with a straw
and a croissant. Super simple. Mommy got
a cappuccino.
>> Cappuccino
>> and also a croissant.
>> This tastes like um adult version of a
chocolate milk. I'm not complaining.
It's actually really good. Oh, it's kind
of warm.
I really like this place,
guys. No joke. That probably was like
the best croissant of my life. Perfectly
crispy on the outside and like warm and
like soft on the inside. Chef's kiss.

kind of tastes like a frozen margarita

>> Guys, Rojo was actually really good. I
didn't expect this to be that good just
given that it blew up on Tik Tok and the
cocktails are all amazing. It's like egg
themed which is really clever and the
food surprisingly [music] was fairly
delicious. It's a really fun place. I
think it's a great great date night spot
that I went with my mom. But highly
highly recommend if you guys are like
shopping in Lee and just like just
[music] stop by after for light bite and
some drinks. And now we are kind of so
hungry, but I also love eating

frying with our garlic.
